title: Using Docs as a place to edit content

posts.author: sdimbert (Seth)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have done a bunch of research and learned how to add Workdocs to my board and how to populate them with Dynamic Values.

My board tracks podcast episodes and each item (an episode) has multiple columns which represent the parts of the episode outline. I created a Worddoc template which contains all of those columns so that, when I create and view the doc, it shows me each episode segment… but they aren’t editable. I assumed that I would be able to leverage the Workdoc as a place to edit the content of each segment while viewing the others for context.

Am I missing something?
